/usr/bin/ar qc libinputflow_core.a CMakeFiles/inputflow_core.dir/src/app/inputflow_app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/inputflow_core.dir/src/config/json_mapping_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/inputflow_core.dir/src/config/mapping_validator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/inputflow_core.dir/src/joystick/joystick_mapping_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/inputflow_core.dir/src/joystick/joystick_provider_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/inputflow_core.dir/src/input/input_provider_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/inputflow_core.dir/src/util/key_code_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/inputflow_core.dir/src/platform/platform_detect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/inputflow_core.dir/src/platform/mac/input_provider_mac.mm.o CMakeFiles/inputflow_core.dir/src/platform/mac/joystick_provider_mac.mm.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libinputflow_core.a
